payload.body:
Implementation complete.

Completed work:
- Upgraded root Oxc tooling in `package.json`: `oxfmt` to `^0.55.0`, `oxlint` to `^1.70.0`.
- Refreshed `pnpm-lock.yaml` with `oxfmt@0.55.0` and `oxlint@1.70.0`.
- Applied required formatter output from the new `oxfmt` version.
- Fixed new `oxlint` findings: removed useless object spreads and newly unused declarations.

Branch: `cycle/UKN-4E9R4-oxc-tooling`
Remote: https://github.com/robertpitt/cycle/tree/cycle/UKN-4E9R4-oxc-tooling
Commit: `03cf451d1` (`Upgrade Oxc tooling`)

Verification performed:
- `pnpm lint` passed.
- `pnpm format:check` passed.
- `pnpm check` passed after running `pnpm install` to install all workspace dependencies in the dedicated worktree.

Known limitations:
- No PR created, per ticket workflow instructions.
